Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const cookie=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); const paths=['/pos','/dashboard','/orders','/inventory','/reports','/staff','/settings','/kitchen']; \(async \(\) => { for \(const p of paths\) { await new Promise\(res => { const req = http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+cookie}}, r => { console.log\(p.padEnd\(12\), r.statusCode\); res\(\); }\); req.end\(\); }\); } }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=\(u\)=>encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:u,issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); const ROLES={admin:'usr_elena',manager:'usr_maya',cashier:'usr_aisha',kitchen:'usr_lukas'}; const PATHS=['/dashboard','/pos','/orders','/menu','/inventory','/reports','/staff','/settings','/kitchen']; \(async \(\) => { for \(const [role,uid] of Object.entries\(ROLES\)\) { console.log\('---', role, '---'\); for \(const p of PATHS\) { await new Promise\(res => { const req = http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c\(uid\)}}, r => { console.log\(p.padEnd\(12\), r.statusCode\); res\(\); }\); req.end\(\); }\); } } }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=\(u,r\)=>encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:u,role:r,issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); const PATHS=['/dashboard','/pos','/orders','/menu','/inventory','/kitchen','/settings','/staff','/reports']; \(async \(\) => { for \(const p of PATHS\) { await new Promise\(res => { const req = http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path:p,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c\('usr_elena','admin'\)}}, r => { console.log\(p.padEnd\(12\), r.statusCode\); res\(\); }\); req.end\(\); }\); } }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(path\) { return new Promise\(res => { const req = http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}}, r => { let d=''; r.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); r.on\('end',\(\)=>res\(d\)\); }\); req.end\(\); }\); } \(async \(\) => { const html = await fetch\('/orders'\); const matches = ['#5821','#5820','Olivia','Walk-in','Cancelled','Refunded'].map\(m => [m, html.includes\(m\)]\); console.log\('orders:', matches\); const inv = await fetch\('/inventory'\); console.log\('inventory has Bluestone:', inv.includes\('Bluestone'\)\); console.log\('inventory has matcha:', inv.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('matcha'\)\); const k = await fetch\('/kitchen'\); console.log\('kitchen has tickets badge:', k.includes\('tickets in flight'\)\); }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(path\){return new Promise\(res=>{const req=http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}},r=>{let d='';r.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>res\({status:r.statusCode,body:d}\)\);}\);req.end\(\);}\);} \(async \(\) => { const inv = await fetch\('/inventory'\); console.log\('inventory:', inv.status, 'Receive stock btn:', inv.body.includes\('Receive stock'\), 'New item btn:', inv.body.includes\('New item'\)\); const st = await fetch\('/staff'\); console.log\('staff:', st.status, 'Invite btn:', st.body.includes\('Invite'\), 'Add member btn:', st.body.includes\('Add member'\)\); const set = await fetch\('/settings'\); console.log\('settings:', set.status, 'Invite btn:', set.body.includes\('Invite'\)\); }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(path\){return new Promise\(res=>{const req=http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}},r=>{let d='';r.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>res\({status:r.statusCode,body:d}\)\);}\);req.end\(\);}\);} \(async \(\) => { const st = await fetch\('/staff'\); console.log\('staff:', st.status, 'Add member:', st.body.includes\('Add member'\), 'Invite removed:', !st.body.match\(/<button[^>]*>[^<]*Invite[^<]*</\)\); }\)\(\);")

Bash("C:/Program Files/nodejs/node.exe" -e "const http=require\('http'\); const c=encodeURIComponent\(JSON.stringify\({userId:'usr_elena',role:'admin',issuedAt:Date.now\(\)}\)\); function fetch\(path\){return new Promise\(res=>{const req=http.request\({host:'localhost',port:3000,path,headers:{cookie:'brewline_session='+c}},r=>{let d='';r.on\('data',c=>d+=c\);r.on\('end',\(\)=>res\(d\)\);}\);req.end\(\);}\);} \(async \(\) => { const staff = await fetch\('/staff'\); console.log\('staff page:'\); console.log\('  Add member btn:', staff.includes\('Add member'\)\); console.log\('  Manage roles btn:', staff.includes\('Manage roles'\)\); console.log\('  DB user \(Elena\):', staff.includes\('Elena Volkova'\)\); const orders = await fetch\('/orders'\); console.log\('orders page:'\); console.log\('  Filters btn:', orders.includes\('Filters'\)\); console.log\('  Advanced btn removed:', !orders.match\(/<button[^>]*>[^<]*Advanced[^<]*</\)\); }\)\(\);")
